disabled.name: dmwappushservice
disabled.reason: Windows Push Messaging User Data Service (telemetry)

disabled.name: MapsBroker
disabled.reason: Downloaded Maps Manager - unused for development workstations

disabled.name: RetailDemo
disabled.reason: Retail Demo mode service - not needed

disabled.name: WerSvc
disabled.reason: Windows Error Reporting - can be disabled

manual.name: SysMain
manual.reason: Superfetch/Prefetch - conditionally disabled in File System module for NVMe

manual.name: WSearch
manual.reason: Windows Search - configured with exclusions, not fully disabled

manual.name: PeerDistSvc
manual.reason: BranchCache - not needed for single-user workstation

manual.name: PrintNotify
manual.reason: Print spooler notification - not needed if no printer

asus.name: ArmouryCrate.Service
asus.description: Reasserts ASUS power plan at boot; requires scheduled task countermeasure

protected.reason: Hyper-V Host Service - CRITICAL for virtualization

protected.name: vmms
protected.reason: Hyper-V Virtual Machine Management - CRITICAL for virtualization

protected.name: LxssManager
protected.reason: WSL Lxss Manager - CRITICAL for WSL2

protected.name: VmCompute
protected.reason: Hyper-V Compute Service - CRITICAL for virtualization

protected.name: vmic*
protected.reason: All Hyper-V VM Integration Services - CRITICAL for VM functionality

metadata.description: Windows service configuration for WinOptimizer - Disabled, Manual, OEM, and Protected service lists
metadata.extensibility: Users can add custom entries to disabled/manual lists. Protected list MUST NOT be modified.
